---
title: "Marco Visconti, storia del trecento cavata dalle cronache di quel secolo"
---

## Marco Visconti, storia del trecento cavata dalle cronache di quel secolo

**Author:** Tommaso Grossi
**Date:** 1834
**Imprint:** Milan

### Notes

The translation referred to is probably that by Caroline Ward, published as <i>Marco Visconti: A Romance of the Fourteenth Century </i>- 2 vols (London 1836).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
